summary: TWO_COLUMN: Pell equation x²-7y²=1 with fundamental solution (8, 3). LEFT axes with BLUE hyperbola branch + always_redraw RED current dot and YELLOW trail of (x_k, y_k) driven by ValueTracker k_tr through k=1..5. Recursion (x,y)→(8x+21y, 3x+8y). RIGHT has live x_k, y_k, x_k²-7y_k²=1 check, and y_k/x_k converging to 1/√7.
